findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_project_context" references sensitive artifacts (env var, secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "check_test" appears informational but accepts parameters (command) that enable code/file/secret access.

evidence.snippet: task, path, session_id, file_filter, area, question, command, with_coverage, failed_only, diff_base, include_flaky, include_missing, timeout_ms, detail_level, coverage_top, limit, inline_files
